name: Clara Pipeline B — Onboarding → v2 + Changelog

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'skipped', reason: 'v2_already_exists', account_id: $json.account_id, message: 'v2 already exists. Pass force=true to re-run.' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  status: 'ok',
  pipeline: 'B',
  account_id: $json.account_id,
  company_name: $json.v2_company_name || $json.company_name,
  transition: 'v1_to_v2',
  spec_status: $json.spec_status,
  go_live_ready: $json.go_live_ready,
  changelog_summary: $json.changelog_summary,
  outputs: {
    v2_memo: $json.v2_memo_path,
    v2_spec: $json.spec_path,
    changelog_md: $json.changelog_md_path,
    changelog_json: $json.changelog_json_path
  },
  next_step: $json.go_live_ready
    ? 'Ready for Retell agent import (see README: Retell Manual Import Instructions)'
    : `Resolve ${$json.unknowns_remaining} remaining unknown(s) before go-live`
}) }}
